data.content: Removed the obsolete Direct view and its entry points. Navigation no longer exposes the Direct tab; breakdown flows now route directly to the Breakdown view via parent id. Deleted direct-only UI/prefill/state modules and associated tests, removed direct action mapping from settings/setup surfaces, and updated README/help-facing copy and screenshot references. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit (pass), bun run test (pass), bun run build (fails with pre-existing Next prerender error on /beads and /_global-error, reproducible on pristine main).
